note: Hand-maintained descriptions for Ether modules. Edit this file to update descriptions.

descriptions.ether-parent: Parent POM and BOM managing all external dependency versions across the ecosystem
descriptions.ether-config: Typed configuration entry points and composition APIs for Ether applications
descriptions.ether-crypto: Cryptographic utilities: hashing, encoding, secure random, key generation
descriptions.ether-database-core: Database contracts: DatabaseClient interface and RowMapper abstraction
descriptions.ether-database-postgres: PostgreSQL error classification, SQL state constants, and pg-specific helpers
descriptions.ether-json: JsonCodec interface built on Jackson for flexible and pluggable serialization
descriptions.ether-jwt: Lightweight cryptographic primitives for JWT: HS256, RS256, ES256 token operations
descriptions.ether-observability-core: Health checks, request ID generation, timing recording, and metrics contracts
descriptions.ether-http-core: Core HTTP contracts: HttpExchange, HttpHandler, Middleware, routing abstractions
descriptions.ether-http-security: CORS policies, security headers, IP allowlisting, and rate limiting configurations
descriptions.ether-http-problem: RFC 7807 Problem Details error response formatting for HTTP APIs
descriptions.ether-http-openapi: Programmatic OpenAPI 3.1 specification builder — describe your API in Java code
descriptions.ether-http-client: Outbound HTTP client built on java.net.http with retry and JSON parsing support
descriptions.ether-logging-core: Logging contracts and structured log support for Ether applications
descriptions.ether-ai-core: AI provider contracts: ChatClient, CompletionRequest, Message abstractions
descriptions.ether-ai-openai: OpenAI provider implementation for ether-ai-core (chat completions, embeddings)
descriptions.ether-http-jetty12: Production-ready HTTP server integrating all ether-http-* modules via Jetty 12
descriptions.ether-websocket-core: Transport-agnostic WebSocket contracts: Session, MessageHandler, frame types
descriptions.ether-websocket-jetty12: Jetty 12-based WebSocket server implementation of ether-websocket-core
descriptions.ether-webhook: Webhook delivery, signing (HMAC-SHA256), and signature verification support
descriptions.ether-glowroot-jetty12: Glowroot APM instrumentation plugin for Jetty 12 — zero code modification required
descriptions.ether-hexagonal-archetype: Maven archetype that scaffolds a hexagonal architecture multi-module project ready to use with the Ether framework
descriptions.ether-brain-parent: Parent POM for the ether-brain multi-module agent runtime
descriptions.ether-brain-common: Shared value objects, domain events, and utilities for ether-brain modules
descriptions.ether-brain-ports: Port interfaces (input/output) for the AI agent hexagonal architecture
descriptions.ether-brain-core: Core agent domain: Agent, AgentContext, memory and reasoning use-cases
descriptions.ether-brain-infra-memory: In-memory implementations of ether-brain-ports for local development and testing
descriptions.ether-brain-tools-local: Built-in tool registry with file-system, shell, and math tools for local agents
descriptions.ether-brain-bootstrap: Wiring module: assembles a runnable agent from core + infra + tools + transport
descriptions.ether-brain-transport-cli: CLI transport adapter for ether-brain — run agents interactively from the terminal
descriptions.ether-di: Explicit dependency injection building blocks for Java 21+: Lazy, Closer, and Bootstrap — no reflection, no annotations, GraalVM native-image compatible
